zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Corbet於大約1157年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾朋特斯波利時，他的父親Walter Corbet44歲，母親Ana d'Umfraville40歲。他於大約1178年與Alice De Valognes在蘇格蘭洛包爾馬可斯東 豪斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1208年在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Corbet于大约1157年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾朋特斯波利时，他的父亲Walter Corbet44岁，母亲Ana d'Umfraville40岁。他于大约1178年与Alice De Valognes在苏格兰洛包爾馬可斯東 豪斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1208年在他的家乡享年53岁。

en.Makerstoun House, Makerstoun, Roxburghsh: Makerstoun House, Makerstoun, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Corbet was born about 1157, in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Corbet, was 44 and his mother, Ana d'Umfraville, was 40. He married Alice De Valognes about 1178, in Makerstoun House, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1208, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Corbet est né environ 1157, à Pontesbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Corbet, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Ana d'Umfraville, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Alice De Valognes environ 1178, à Makerstoun House, Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 1208, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Corbet um 1157 in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Corbet 44 und seine Mutter Ana d'Umfraville 40. Er hat um 1178 in Makerstoun House, Roxburghshire, Scotland Alice De Valognes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1208 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Alice De Valognes circa 1178, nel Makerstoun House, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1208, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ko.Makerstoun House, Makerstoun, Roxburghsh: 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 마커스토우 마커스토우 허스
ko.lifeSummary: Walter Corbet(이)가 대략 1157년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 폰츠버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Corbet(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Ana d'Umfraville(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1178년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 마커스토우 허스에서 Alice De Valognes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1208년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Alice De Valognes aproximadamente 1178, em Makerstoun House, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Corbet родился около 1157 г. в местности понтесбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Corbet было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Ana d'Umfraville, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice De Valognes около 1178 г. в местности меикирстоун хоус, роксбургшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер около 1208 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.
